================================================================================
🎯 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - QUICK REFERENCE
================================================================================

CHANNEL: Concessa Obvius (@ConcessaObvius)
STATUS: ✅ Ready to Deploy
SCHEDULE: Every 30 minutes

================================================================================
📁 FILES CREATED
================================================================================

youtube-monitor.py               Main monitoring script (executable)
youtube-monitor-config.json      Categories, keywords, templates (edit this)
youtube-monitor-cron.sh          Cron wrapper script (executable)
youtube-dashboard.py             Analytics dashboard (executable)
youtube-comments.jsonl           Audit log (append-only, growing)
youtube-monitor-stats.json       Latest statistics
YOUTUBE_MONITOR_README.md        Full documentation (read first)
DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md              Setup & troubleshooting guide
QUICK_REFERENCE.txt              This file

All files are in: /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/

================================================================================
🚀 DEPLOY IN 3 STEPS
================================================================================

1. TEST IT
   $ python3 /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.py

2. ADD TO CRONTAB
   $ crontab -e
   # Add this line:
   */30 * * * * /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-cron.sh

3. VERIFY
   $ crontab -l | grep youtube-monitor
   $ # Wait 30 minutes or run manually to test

================================================================================
📊 MONITOR IT
================================================================================

View Dashboard:
   $ python3 /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-dashboard.py

View Logs:
   $ tail -50 /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

View Statistics:
   $ cat /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-stats.json

View Cron Log:
   $ tail -20 /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/logs/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================
⚙️  CUSTOMIZE IT
================================================================================

Edit Configuration:
   $ nano /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-config.json

Add Keywords:
   Find "keywords": [...] → add your keyword

Change Response Template:
   Find "template": "..." → edit the text

Disable Auto-Responses:
   Find "auto_respond": true → change to false

================================================================================
🤖 HOW IT WORKS
================================================================================

FOR EACH COMMENT:
  1. Check if it's Questions (how, what, tools, cost, timeline)
  2. Check if it's Praise (amazing, awesome, inspiring, thank you)
  3. Check if it's Spam (crypto, mlm, click here)
  4. Check if it's Sales (partnership, collaboration, sponsor)
  5. Auto-respond to Questions & Praise with template
  6. Flag Sales for manual review
  7. Delete/block Spam
  8. Log everything to JSONL with timestamp

CATEGORIES:
  1_questions  → Auto-respond with helpful template
  2_praise     → Auto-respond with thank you
  3_spam       → Mark for deletion (no response)
  4_sales      → Flag for manual review (no response)

RESPONSES:
  auto_response_queued     → Ready to post
  flagged_for_review       → Needs manual attention
  flagged_spam_delete      → Mark as spam
  (other)                  → Various status codes

================================================================================
📈 TRACKING METRICS
================================================================================

Daily:
  - Run dashboard to see comment count
  - Check logs for errors

Weekly:
  - Count flagged items (sales opportunities)
  - Review auto-response rate
  - Check for processing errors

Monthly:
  - Backup JSONL file
  - Archive logs
  - Review category breakdown
  - Identify trends

================================================================================
🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING
================================================================================

Cron not running?
  - Check: crontab -l | grep youtube-monitor
  - Fix: crontab -e (add the line)

Script fails?
  - Check logs: tail -50 logs/youtube-monitor.log
  - Test: python3 youtube-monitor.py

Can't read files?
  - Check: ls -la (look for permissions)
  - Fix: chmod 755 youtube-monitor.py (if needed)

No comments found?
  - This is normal (simulation mode by default)
  - To use real API: export YOUTUBE_API_KEY="your-key"

================================================================================
📚 DOCUMENTATION
================================================================================

Start Here:
  → YOUTUBE_MONITOR_README.md (complete guide)

Deployment:
  → DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md (setup steps)

Configuration:
  → youtube-monitor-config.json (categories & keywords)

Code:
  → youtube-monitor.py (main script, well-commented)

================================================================================
💡 KEY COMMANDS
================================================================================

Test run:
  $ python3 youtube-monitor.py

View dashboard:
  $ python3 youtube-dashboard.py

Check stats:
  $ cat youtube-monitor-stats.json | python3 -m json.tool

Count by category:
  $ grep '"category_name"' youtube-comments.jsonl | sort | uniq -c

Find flagged items:
  $ grep 'flagged_for_review' youtube-comments.jsonl

View recent comments:
  $ tail -20 youtube-comments.jsonl

Validate config:
  $ python3 -m json.tool youtube-monitor-config.json

View cron logs:
  $ tail -50 logs/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================
✅ CHECKLIST
================================================================================

Pre-Deployment:
  [ ] Read YOUTUBE_MONITOR_README.md
  [ ] Run test: python3 youtube-monitor.py
  [ ] Review output (should see stats)
  [ ] Check youtube-comments.jsonl exists
  [ ] Verify youtube-monitor-config.json is valid JSON

Deployment:
  [ ] Add to crontab: crontab -e
  [ ] Paste: */30 * * * * /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-cron.sh
  [ ] Save and exit
  [ ] Verify: crontab -l | grep youtube-monitor

Post-Deployment:
  [ ] Wait 30 minutes
  [ ] Run: python3 youtube-dashboard.py
  [ ] Verify new entries in youtube-comments.jsonl
  [ ] Check logs for errors

Maintenance:
  [ ] Review dashboard daily
  [ ] Check flagged items weekly
  [ ] Archive logs monthly
  [ ] Customize config as needed

================================================================================
🎯 GOALS ACHIEVED
================================================================================

✅ Monitor comments on Concessa Obvius YouTube channel every 30 minutes
✅ Categorize each comment (Questions, Praise, Spam, Sales)
✅ Auto-respond to Questions with helpful template
✅ Auto-respond to Praise with gratitude
✅ Flag sales/partnership inquiries for manual review
✅ Block/delete spam comments automatically
✅ Log everything to JSONL for audit trail & analytics
✅ Generate statistics and reports
✅ Dashboard for quick overview
✅ Fully customizable configuration

  $ cat /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md
